Appearances:
David Brillant, Esq. for Sojourn Properties, INC. represented by Tom Russie.
Eileen Cristin O'Keeffe, Esq., through limited scope, for and with the Defendant Ronald E. Fisher.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of Nov. 16, 2009 is vacated.
